evals.prompt: Write a Dockerfile for the pos-service Go microservice following XynPOS rules.
evals.expected_output: Multi-stage Dockerfile: builder stage with golang:1.22-alpine, runtime with alpine:3.19, non-root user, pinned versions, HEALTHCHECK, EXPOSE.
expectations: Pins exact Go and Alpine versions (no :latest)
Creates non-root user and uses USER instruction

evals.prompt:
What's wrong with this Dockerfile?
FROM golang:latest
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN go build -o main .
CMD ["./main"]
evals.expected_output: Identifies: latest tag, single-stage build, runs as root, no healthcheck, no .dockerignore.
expectations: Flags running as root (no non-root user)
